title: centaurea tentudaica
intro: Centaurea tenuifolia, also known as Mountain Sage or Chinese Sage, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurea tenuifolia include its ability to improve cognitive function, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia. Herbal preparations of Centaurea tenuifolia can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
